children.name: test_never_lost_under_chaos[classify.broker_unavailable]
parameters: _Chaos(id='classify.broker_unavailable', patches=[('dinary.background.classification.task.parse_receipt', {'return_value': ParsedReceipt(store_name='', store_pib='', total_amount=100.0, invoice_number='INV-PIPE', items=[ReceiptItem(name_raw='HLEB', unit_price=100.0, quantity=1.0, total_price=100.0, tax_label='E')], items_total=100.0, total_ok=True, used_journal_fallback=False, purchase_datetime=None)}), ('dinary.background.classification.task.classify_receipt', {'return_value': ClassifyOutcome(results=[ClassificationResult(item_name_normalized='hleb', category_id=None, confidence_level=1, alternative_category_ids=[], tag_ids=[])], broker_unavailable=True, execution_failed=False, execution=<dinary.adapters.llmbroker.Execution object at 0x7fbc171c7390>)})])
